stories.headline: Microsoft Admits It Can't Build at the Largest Scale Yet — So It's Going Mid-Class
stories.summary: Microsoft launched a mid-class speech transcription model; Suleyman admitted compute constraints prevent building at largest scale. Reducing OpenAI dependence.

stories.headline: Oracle Cut 30,000 Jobs to Fund AI Data Centres
stories.summary: Oracle cut 18% of global workforce (20-30k jobs) via single email to fund Stargate AI data centre buildout after raising $50B in January.

stories.headline: KPMG Trains Tax Professionals to 'Vibe Code' — Claims a 10x Consultant Is Coming
stories.summary: KPMG US six-week pilot had tax professionals build client tools using AI vibe coding. Framed as path to '10x consultant'. Governance and quality questions unaddressed.

stories.headline: Google Releases Gemma 4 Under Apache 2.0
stories.summary: Gemma 4 open-weights family (2B-31B), Apache 2.0 licence, 256K context, multimodal. Positioned as domestic alternative to Chinese open-weights models.

stories.headline: Anthropic Accidentally Leaked Claude Code's Full Source — 512,000 Lines
stories.summary: Anthropic exposed Claude Code's 512K-line TypeScript source via misconfigured npm sourcemap. 25K GitHub stars within hours. Supply chain security risk highlighted.

held_stories.headline: OpenAI Shutting Down Sora — App Closes April 26
held_stories.summary: Sora discontinued: peaked at 1M users, fell to 500K, cost $1M/day. Compute reallocated to enterprise/coding. Disney $1B partnership collapsed.
held_stories.reason_held: Displaced by KPMG vibe coding story in final edit — carry to next week if still relevant
